alt_forms.note: ⚠️ WH: 貫通値 is used in WH40K Japan for the AP (Armour Penetration) stat value. The 値 (value) suffix mirrors WH datasheet layout. 貫通力 (power form) is recommended.
Classical native Japanese: 鎧通し (armour-piercing dagger). Evocative flavour option; historically a short blade designed to pierce armour gaps.

definitions.gloss_en: a stat representing a weapon's ability to pierce through a target's armour
definitions.gloss_jp: {武|ぶ}{器|き}が{対|たい}{象|しょう}の{鎧|よろい}を{貫|かん}{通|つう}する{能|のう}{力|りょく}を{示|しめ}す{ステータス|すてーたす}
definitions.explanation_en: A stat indicating how effectively a weapon defeats protective armour. Higher 貫通力 means the weapon ignores more of the target's defensive value.
definitions.implicit_notes: ⚠️ WH: 貫通値 is the WH40K Japan term for Armour Penetration (AP). The 値 suffix is WH's datasheet-value naming convention. 貫通力 uses the 力 suffix (capability/power) instead, avoiding the WH-specific form while retaining the same concept.
definitions.orthography_notes: 貫通: 貫 (pierce through) + 通 (pass through). 力 (ryoku): power/capacity as a stat suffix. 貫通 is a standard Japanese word for penetration (Goo dictionary). 貫通力 appears in military ballistics contexts independently of WH Japan. The WH Japan term is specifically 貫通値 (penetration value).
definitions.game_setting_notes: ⚠️ WH high-priority: 貫通値 is the exact WH40K Japan AP stat label. Recommended form: 貫通力 (penetrating power) to clearly distinguish from WH datasheet terminology.

usage_jp: {貫|かん}{通|つう}{力|りょく}ステータス (penetration stat); {高|たか}い{貫|かん}{通|つう}{力|りょく}を{持|も}つ{武|ぶ}{器|き} (weapon with high penetration)
comparative_notes: 貫通値 is WH Japan's specific term and should be avoided. 貫通力 achieves the same concept. 鎧通し is a historical flavour option suitable for non-stat flavour text.

examples.japanese: {銃|じゅう}{弾|だん}はヘルメットを{貫|かん}{通|つう}した。

cross_references.note: 鎧 — armour; what 貫通力 defeats
防御 — defense; modified by 貫通力
